steps.title: Find the Jupiter weight
steps.content:
Jupiter weight is $247.5\%$ of Earth weight, so multiply by $2.475$.
$$2.475(240.00)=594.00$$

steps.title: Convert Saturn to a percent
steps.content: Let $x$ be the percent of Jupiter weight represented by Saturn weight. $$250.07=\frac{x}{100}(594.00)$$ $$x=\frac{250.07}{594.00}\cdot 100$$ $$x=42.10$$ The closest listed value is $42.10$. The answer is A.
